Description: Resolve to appoint a chairperson for the meeting
Confirm the minutes of the Annual General Meeting held 20 November 2024
Resolve to receive the OC Manager's report
Resolve to receive the Committee activity report
Resolve payment of excess amounts on insurance claims as required
Adopt the audited financial reports for FY September 2024–August 2025 (Admin Fund: $250,206.67; Maintenance Fund: $633,336.23)
Approve the Administration Fund budget of $1
Approve the Maintenance Fund budget of $303
Resolve quarterly levies payable on 1 September, 1 December, 1 March, and 1 June each year
Resolve the number of committee member positions
Resolve to accept individual nominations and elect committee members
Resolve that the OC Committee acts as the Grievance Committee
Delegate all powers to the Committee, excluding items requiring unanimous or special resolution
Authorise 10% interest per annum on fees in arrears more than 30 days
Resolve to proceed with debt collection proceedings and recover associated costs from lot owners in arrears
